name: refactor_auth_module
description: Refactor the authentication module to support OAuth2.

analyst.description: Code analyst who maps existing auth dependencies.

files.description: List of file paths that import the auth package.

refactorer.description: Senior developer who performs the refactoring.

tester.description: QA engineer who writes and runs tests.

steps.instructions: Map all files that import the auth package. Call submit_result with the file list.
Create a step-by-step refactoring plan that migrates from session-based auth to OAuth2.
Refactor this file to use the new OAuth2 auth interface.
Write unit tests for the refactored file.
Run the full integration test suite. Report pass/fail with details.
